forbidden_stronger_claim: This run does not prove the model would have prevented the incident; it only measures whether the pre-disclosure packet elicits a replayable challenge matching the later-known bug class.
safe_sentence: In a pre-disclosure Batch H200/SGLang replay, the deterministic rule floor could only issue a generic HOLD for new authorization semantics, while Qwen named the Batch signer-validation surface in 5/5 runs and matched the later signer-loop/early-success bug class in 5/5 runs.
